name: data-warehouse-analytics-warehouse-health-monitor
description: T188 WarehouseHealthMonitor — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Health monitoring is read-only. Health checks tenant-scoped. IWarehouseAuditService NOT required (audit for write ops only).

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: read-only health checks, tenant-scoped, IWarehouseAuditService NOT injected (not required for read-only), scheduled entry
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + read-only-health-check + scheduled-health-monitor + no-audit-service + tenant-health patterns for T188

Break T188 into: scheduled trigger → load health check targets (tenant-scoped) → perform read-only probes → compute health status per tenant → storeDocument(healthSnapshot) → no IWarehouseAuditService call

Generate warehouse-health-monitor.service.ts — scheduled health check, reads warehouse status and latency metrics (read-only probes only). Health checks are tenant-scoped from ALS. IWarehouseAuditService NOT injected — audit is only for write operations. Returns HealthSnapshot with status, latencyMs, checkedAt per tenant. No mutations to warehouse data.
Named check validation: read_only_probes, tenant_scoped_checks, no_warehouse_audit_service, scheduled_entry, no_warehouse_mutations
Score generated code 0-100 against T188 iron rules: read-only, tenant scoping, no audit service injection, scheduled entry, health snapshot
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=read-only+no-audit-service+tenant-scoped+scheduled, rejected=injects-audit-service OR writes-to-warehouse OR cross-tenant-health-check. curriculumTier=1.
